  "findings": [
    "Visible cold joint between concrete lifts",
    "Potential discontinuity in structural integrity",
    "Lack of proper bonding between successive placements"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop further concrete placement",
    "Evaluate extent and depth of cold joint",
    "Consult engineer for remediation (e.g., surface preparation, bonding agents, or removal and replacement)"
  ],
  "rationale": "A visible cold joint indicates that the previous lift hardened before the next was placed, preventing monolithic behavior. Per ACI 301 and 304, cold joints are defects that compromise structural integrity and durability unless specifically designed and treated as construction joints.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 301-20 Section 5.3.2.3 (Placing requirements)",
    "ACI 304R-00 Section 5.6 (Cold joints)"
  ]
}
